title: Livepeer Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The submission provides a detailed overview of the security audit findings for the Livepeer smart contracts and network protocols. It identifies multiple vulnerabilities and provides clear recommendations for addressing them.
audit.improvements: The submission could benefit from a more detailed explanation of the potential impact of each vulnerability, as well as a section on the methodology used during the audit. Additionally, providing specific examples of how the recommendations could be implemented would strengthen the submission.
